channel.title: Moonlight Architecture on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Moonlight Architecture on Pionia

item.title: Introduction to MoonLight Architecture
item.description: MoonLight is a rather new architecture that is based on the commonly used architectures of gRPC, MVC(Model View Controller), Micro-Services and Monolothic.

item.title: Security in moonlight
item.description: All requests sent to the server get encrypted and decrypted on the web server level. This ensures that the data is secure and not exposed in the URL. However, all query params are logged in the web server level, the architecture encourages to perform all requests over POST.

item.title: API versioning in Moonlight
item.description: One switch per API version; register in environment/settings.ini.
